title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Negotiate and Enter Into an Agreement with Landbank of the Philippines Through Their Uplb Branch for the Local Government Unit Credit Line Facility Also Known As the Omnibus Term Loan Facility Which Would Serve As Standby Fund for the Development Projects of the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHOR: JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 10/24/2022)
